description: Using the loaded CT Cranium DICOM dataset in InVesalius 3, generate a 3D surface of the skull (bone mask) and create a rotating animation of the model. Export the animation as either a series of at least 12 PNG screenshots covering at least 180 degrees of rotation to /home/ga/Documents/skull_rotation_frames/ or as a video file to /home/ga/Documents/skull_rotation.avi. Ensure the output captures the rotation clearly.
